sourceMovie.title: Around the World in 80 Days
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Around the World in 80 Days works as a action movie with a point of view—fans quote moments, but they also argue about what the film is actually saying about power, desire, or survival. The action and adventure blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: The Lego Movie 2: The Second Part
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Around the World in 80 Days clicked for you, The Lego Movie 2: The Second Part (2019) is a strong next stop: both trade in action and adventure, with comic timing and sharper banter. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Around the World in 80 Days?
faq.answer: Try The Lego Movie 2: The Second Part, Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles, The Incredible Hulk—each shares DNA with Around the World in 80 Days while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Around the World in 80 Days?
faq.answer: Around the World in 80 Days (2004) is best described as Action, Adventure, Comedy. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Around the World in 80 Days worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 6.0/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this action lane.
